title: How to get the last day of the previous month
task: Find the closing date of last month — report cutoffs, statement dates, accruals.
keywords: last day of previous month excel
first day of month google sheets

excel.note: EOMONTH(date,0) = end of the date's own month; -1 steps back one month.

explanation: EOMONTH jumps to the end of a month a given number of months away: from July 22, offset −1 lands on June 30 — month lengths and leap years handled for you. The companion trick: the FIRST day of the current month is =EOMONTH(TODAY(),-1)+1, and the last day of the current month is EOMONTH(TODAY(),0). Format the result cell as a date.
